channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: The grass verge outside number 33 Brooklyn Road has been removed and is going to be tarmacked also the paving slabs there are now all broken or dislodged, 6th June
item.description:
Outside number 33 Brooklyn Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Brooklyn Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On the corner of the road outside number 1, 6th June
item.description:
The pavement was broken by the new people that has moved in to number 1 Hebden close they was using diggers and stream roller to do their garden and has broken the pavement and now it a trip hazard and is a blind person or has disability could trip over

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hebden Close, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Dangerous damage to paving on right of way next to main drain, 6th June
item.description:
The right of way is outside the back of No12 Croft Avenue between the house and the detached garden. The paving near the severn trent drain is severely damaged and moves when you step on it. There is a hole in the middle and it looks like the paving will collapse. Children use this right of way regularly. I have emailed land registry to see who is responsible and they said: The strip of passageway between the two parts of your registered title GR242209 is not registered. There also appears to be no mention of maintenance responsibility on the title register.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Croft Gardens, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged tree after storm, 6th June
item.description:
Outside front door of 68 the cornfields

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 70, The Cornfields, Bishop's Cleeve, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree broken and blocking pavement., 6th June
item.description:
Outside the school opposite Castle Hill Drive.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbotswood Road, Brockworth, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Planning board not visible, 6th June
item.description:
Hi as you come along the road, with Morrisons supermarket to your left, as you approach the roundabout, the planning board for the roundabout is masked by low hanging branches.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Up Hatherley Way, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lack of dog bins, 6th June
item.description:
There are no dog bins along this route and the nearest are at the children’s playground and because of this they are frequently full and overflowing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Furrow Close, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 58, Welch Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shelburne Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham

item.title: Blocked road drain causing flooding to half of road surface during heavy rain, 6th June
item.description:
The drain outside number 53 an 55 Snowdon gardens is blocked has been for about 18 months
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Snowdon Gardens, Churchdown, Tewkesbury

item.title: Metal warning sign abandoned in hedgerow, 6th June
item.description:
On the junction of Cleeve Hill & Gambles Lane a red pedestrian access only sign thrown into the hedge & abandoned.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gambles Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Debris requires sweeping up please, 5th June
item.description:
Thank you for clearing up the previous debris. Unfortunately since the rain another pile has appeared assuming washed down from the bridge. The pigeons under the bridge are also making a mess and it is unsightly. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Market Street, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Standing Water, 5th June
item.description:
There is a big pool of standing water under the bridge again. It was fixed a while back but has started to happen again. Might be blocked as there is often an accumulation of leaves and litter. Might be helpful for the kerbside to be swept after heavy leaf fall? Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Market Street, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: No rain in 24 hours - water has increased or remained the same

item.title: During heavy rain the drains further up the hill rapidly become blocked by leaves and other debris causing sand gravel and stones to be dep.osited in the drain in question. Although the chamber is not completely full the gravel is above the entry and exit pipes and water flowing in simply flows out again down Ham lane., 5th June
item.description:
What three words location: economies.march.arm About 40m uphill from the drain opposite the post box.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Ham Road, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
